_comment: NanoVMs OPS image config for the InfoVulcan lbrp service (public REST gateway + static web). The ONLY internet-facing image. Serves the WASM bundle from /web/dist and reads services.toml for backend discovery. The ./lbrp-conf dir (mapped to /etc/infovulcan) must hold services.toml and a certs/ subdir. UNVALIDATED template — see deploy/README.md.
